content:
A PhD student from Hong Kong. My current research interests include application of machine learning, especially deep learning, in oncology and development of bioinformatics tools. In the past, I have worked on project relating to microfluidics and mathematical modeling. I also have extensive wet lab experience, e.g. basic molecular biology, tissue culture and drug testing.
As tons of people including experts, doctors and scientist foresee the advancement in artificial intelligence could accelerate the progress of personalized and precision oncology, I have a strong belief that the marriage of deep learning and next generation sequencing could be an indispensable catalyst which fuelling my enthusiasm for applying deep learning on NGS data.
summary:

title: Embedding of genes using cancer gene expression data: biological relevance and potential application on biomarker discovery
Gene embedding: A novel machine learning approach to identify gene candidates related to immunotherapy responsiveness

summary: Deep learning based model for sequential application of chemotherapeutics, i.e. finding sensitizer for chemotherapy. Although trained on cell line data, we envision the model could help clinicians to identify the best treatment strategy for patients.
title: DeepSAC
Upregulation of Bcl2 in NSCLC with acquired resistance to EGFR‑TKI
Preclinical study on the efficacy of Panobinostat in hepatocellular carcinoma
Low expressions of ASS1 and OTC in glioblastoma suggest the potential clinical use of recombinant human arginase (rhArg)
Preclinical Evaluation of the Recombinant Human Arginase PEG-BCT-100 leading to Arginine Deprivation in Gliomas
Preclinical evaluation of the recombinant human arginase PEG-BCT-100 leading to arginine deprivation in sarcomas

summary: Using embedding to infer related genes from large molecular dataset. Embedding is able to represent categorical variables (in this case, genes) with continuous numbers, i.e. vector. Some interesting properties including gene relatedness and/or semantic meaning of genes are preserved and reflected in the embedding space.
title: Gene Embedding

summary: Develop a python package with GUI powered by Flask to model cancers chemoresistance dynamics and predict chemoresistance onset.
title: Resim

summary: Flask app to classify malignant skin lesion from benign moles using photo captured by mobile phone. Fine-tuned a pre-trained ResNext50 with HAM10000 dataset.
title: Skinapp
